# Sweet Fifth Celebration Guide

Welcome to the theme where joy spreads. This gathering promises fun for everyone.

## Games
Try hiding the toy box.
Play balloon toss.
Hold the cake decoration contest.

## Snacks
Serve cake slices.
Give juice boxes.
Prepare watermelon cups.

## Decor
Use streamers.
Wear hats.
Hang the banner sign.

## Closing
Ensure each guest enjoys fun for everyone today.<|im_end|>

final_answer:
# Sweet Fifth Celebration Guide

Welcome to the theme where joy spreads. This gathering promises fun for everyone.

## Games
Try hiding the toy box.
Play balloon toss.
Hold the cake decoration contest.

## Snacks
Serve cake slices.
Give juice boxes.
Prepare watermelon cups.

## Decor
Use streamers.
Wear hats.
Hang the banner sign.

## Closing
Ensure each guest enjoys fun for everyone today.<|im_end|>
